ncs_standard_definition.description_short: Space Planners design and optimize interior spaces to meet the needs of occupants, balancing aesthetics, functionality, and safety.
ncs_standard_definition.description_detailed: Space Planners work with architects, engineers, and clients to create functional and aesthetically pleasing spaces, considering factors like ergonomics, acoustics, and sustainability.

first_stepper.description: High school students interested in design, architecture, or engineering can pursue a degree in a related field.

choice_maker.description: Individuals with a generic degree can acquire relevant skills through certifications or bridge courses.
certifications_or_bridge_needed: LEED AP (Leadership in Energy and Environmental Design Accredited Professional)
NCIDQ (National Council for Interior Design Qualification)

future_builder.description: Experienced Space Planners can advance their careers by developing expertise in specialized areas like sustainable design or healthcare planning.
future_builder.prerequisite_experience: 5+ years of experience as a Junior Space Planner

problem_solver_uturn.description: Individuals from unrelated fields can transition into Space Planning by acquiring relevant skills and experience.
portfolio_proof_required: Space Planning Project (e.g., designing a commercial interior)
